category_sources: Official README describes Onefetch as a command-line Git information tool that displays project info and code statistics: https://github.com/o2sh/onefetch
source_facts.description says it is a command-line Git information tool.
display_name_sources: Official README heading is Onefetch - Command-line Git information tool.
docs_sources: Official README links to documentation and homepage.
Official repository contains a docs directory.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo already provides https://github.com/o2sh/onefetch; per instruction repo is returned as null.
tags_sources: Official README says Onefetch displays project information and code statistics for local Git repositories.
Official repository topics include git, rust, cli, command-line, and tool.
